propositions: CLAUDE.local.md mixes machine/operator-local content with generally-applicable project rules duplicated from CLAUDE.md.
Generally-applicable rules should be removed from CLAUDE.local.md and live only in shared checked-in guidance (AGENTS.md/docs).
CLAUDE.local.md should retain only machine/operator-local content: the origin/main-tracking LaunchAgent note and Gerrit auth identities/credential-pinning guidance.
Every removed rule must have a verified home in AGENTS.md or docs before removal, with the location cited.
A decision on modernizing away from the CLAUDE.local.md filename toward a gitignored @-import must be recorded; the decision is to keep the current filename.
The file is git-ignored producing no committed artifact, so closure bypassed the completion/signature gate via force-close.
